---
title: "Personalized Marketing Campaign Analysis"
author: "Chunjian Zhang"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: readable
  pdf:
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# Load required libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(lubridate)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r}

```
